cdk.up: AWS_PROFILE={{AWS_PROFILE}} npm ci && npm run build:site && DOMAIN_ARG=${DOMAIN_NAME:+-c domainName=$DOMAIN_NAME} CERT_ARG=${CERTIFICATE_ARN:+-c certificateArn=$CERTIFICATE_ARN} ZONE_ARG=${HOSTED_ZONE_NAME:+-c hostedZoneName=$HOSTED_ZONE_NAME} npx cdk deploy --all -c stage={{STAGE}} $DOMAIN_ARG $CERT_ARG $ZONE_ARG
cdk.down: AWS_PROFILE={{AWS_PROFILE}} npm ci && DOMAIN_ARG=${DOMAIN_NAME:+-c domainName=$DOMAIN_NAME} CERT_ARG=${CERTIFICATE_ARN:+-c certificateArn=$CERTIFICATE_ARN} ZONE_ARG=${HOSTED_ZONE_NAME:+-c hostedZoneName=$HOSTED_ZONE_NAME} npx cdk destroy --all -c stage={{STAGE}} $DOMAIN_ARG $CERT_ARG $ZONE_ARG
